title: Lari Oll
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Lari Oll |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/Her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'm sorry, Master, but the beacon still isn't transmitting.|Lari Oll, to Master Yoda|}} '''Lari Oll''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served as a communications [[Technician/Legends|technician]] in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Oll was on duty in the [[Jedi Temple communication center/Legends|Jedi Temple communication center]] when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|attacked]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Under the supervision of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], Oll attempted to send a message to recall all available Jedi to Coruscant; however, she was unable to break through the Separatists' [[Jammer/Legends|jamming]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|If one of our starfighters could get past the Separatist blockade, there might be a way of relaying a message through the HoloNet.''"
"''Already considered that, Master Tiin has. Attempt to recall Jedi from Belderone, Tythe, and other worlds, he will.|Lari Oll and Yoda|}} [[File:BattleOfCoruscant-EGTW.png|thumb|300px|right|The Separatists' attack on Coruscant]] Lari Oll was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] active during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In the [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]] of the war, Oll was serving as a communications [[Technician/Legends|technician]]{{CSWECite|II|409|Oll, Lari}} in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. She was on duty when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] launched an [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|attack]] on Coruscant. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] wanted to recall all available Jedi to Coruscant; however, due to the attack, the Jedi were unable to communicate over the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]], so they resorted to using the [[Jedi beacon/Legends|Jedi beacon]]. In the [[Jedi Temple communication center/Legends|Jedi Temple communication center]], Oll attempted to send a message out using the beacon. Unable to break through the Separatists' intense signal [[Jammer/Legends|jamming]], Oll suggested to Yoda that if one of the Jedi [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] could get through the Separatist [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] around the planet, they might be able to send a message through the HoloNet. Yoda informed Oll that [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] was already in the process of attempting to get past the enemy [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to recall Jedi. On Yoda's command, Oll [[Comm unit/Legends|commed]] Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]; however, the connection was unclear due to the defensive [[Planetary shield/Legends|shields]] that had been raised. Oll then attempted to comm Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] to no avail. ==Personality and traits== Lari Oll was a [[brown]]-haired Jedi who had reached the rank of Jedi Knight by the final stages of the Clone Wars. ==Powers and abilities== Serving as a communications technician in the Jedi Temple, Oll was capable with the Temple's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] and communications systems. ==Behind the scenes== Lari Oll first appeared in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', written by [[James Luceno]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Lari Oll |es=Lari Oll }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Oll, Lari}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]] [[Category:Technicians]]
